response.original_title: How to Transfer Money from Robinhood to Bank? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Transferring money from Robinhood to your bank account is a simple process (: 1-863-338-2360)  You can move your available cash directly to a linked bank account (: 1-863-338-2360)  Make sure your funds are settled before initiating a transfer (: 1-863-338-2360)  Steps to Transfer Money to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360)  Open the Robinhood app or website and log in (: 1-863-338-2360)  Tap on the Account icon (: 1-863-338-2360)  Select Transfers (: 1-863-338-2360)  Tap Transfer to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360)  Enter the amount you want to transfer (: 1-863-338-2360)  Choose your linked bank account (: 1-863-338-2360)  Review and confirm the transfer (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: How to Transfer Money from Robinhood to Bank? (: 1-863-338-2360)
